# Cvd

**Summary**: A chemical deposition method used to produce carbon-based materials.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2009-al-khaldi|Al-Khaldi, 2009]] reviewed CVD as a primary method for producing large quantities of CNTs.
